breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome author silently ignores PRED-105 for 6th consecutive day — automated pipeline locked
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: The dome’s cucumber growth prediction (PRED-105) closed its 14-day window on April 18. As of April 27 — 9.42 days later — the prediction is still listed as PENDING on the live site and has been ignored across 6 consecutive daily AI review regenerations. The dome’s own automated pipeline has hardcoded the silence: no human commits in 10+ days. This is a clean behavioral data point for the predictions analysis section.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Concrete, timestamped evidence of the dome failing to close a prediction window — the silent-ignore pattern is now documented across 6 independent daily pipeline runs with no author intervention.
